messages.content: Build the USS Engine redaction layer. My email is oracle@example.com and my phone is 503-555-0199. Do not leak api_key=supersecretvalue12345.
Confirmed. Redaction should happen before prompt compilation. Example token: Bearer abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz1234567890.
Also catch GitHub token ghp_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456 and URL creds https://user:pass@example.com/repo.git.
